Fields.Name: Near: Minimum Distance
Fields.Description: The near minimum fade distance, e.g. the distance at which α = 0. In metres.

Fields.Name: Near: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The near maximum fade distance, e.g. where α = MiddleAlpha. In metres.

Fields.Name: Far: Minimum Distance
Fields.Description: The far minimum fade distance, e.g. where α = MiddleAlpha. In metres.

Fields.Name: Far: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The far maximum fade distance, e.g. the distance at which α = 1. In metres.

Fields.Name: Intermediate Alpha Value
Fields.Description: The intermediate alpha value between near and far.
